## Meeting Purpose

[Educate Ashleigh on GrowthX's content creation process and platform to better advocate for the partnership with Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses AI-driven workflows and human expertise to rapidly produce high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Their ContentOS platform organizes topics/keywords into clusters for strategic content planning](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [The process involves deep research on personas, competitors, and industry trends to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX can support full-funnel content creation beyond just blogs (e.g. guides, buyer-focused pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Creation

  - [Combines AI automation with human expertise for rapid, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing editors, content managers, and strategy-level support](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Focus on getting market signals quickly through experimentation and learning](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Aim to find 2+ high-conviction content areas + 1 experimental area](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Use AI workflows to break down content creation steps (research, outlining, writing, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### ContentOS Platform Overview

  - [Organizes content opportunities into clusters and topics](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Allows prioritization and assignment of content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Incorporates persona artifacts, company context, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Features AI-powered pipelines for content development (e.g. keyword research, brief creation, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### Content Strategy and Planning

  - [Conduct deep research on client's personas, competitors, and industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Organize topics into clusters based on product pillars and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Use various sources (Reddit, competitor analysis, SEO tools) to identify relevant topics and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Collaborate with clients to refine and prioritize content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Full-Funnel Content Approach

  - [Not limited to blog posts; can create various content types (guides, buyer-focused pieces, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Balance between awareness-level content and solution-specific pieces](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Build topical authority to support ranking for competitive, high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Consider content's role in nurturing leads through the funnel](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Prophecy's Content Challenges

  - [Recent company pivot necessitates rethinking content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Past reliance on events for quick awareness, which can be inefficient](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Need to bridge the gap between awareness and solution-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Importance of creating discoverable content for ICP at various funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to schedule time with Marcel for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Ashleigh to set up a one-on-one with Raj to discuss GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Determine whether to hold next week's meeting based on Raj's availability and Cody's absence](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Raj's availability for potential meeting scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/xkRkx9qq_mkTogCjGfMk-d1exoHKjbpC?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
